summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shared Dashboard Templates (Plantillas Compartidas) feature. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for all core functionality including save template modal, templates modal with 2 sections, share modal with user selector, and applying templates.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue from previous iteration, charts display correctly

passed_tests: Login with andy.escudero / secreto
POST /api/plantillas - Create private template (compartir=privada)
POST /api/plantillas - Create shared template (compartir=todos)
POST /api/plantillas - Requires authentication (401 without auth)
GET /api/plantillas - Returns templates visible to user (own + shared + todos)
GET /api/plantillas - Returns correct structure (id, nombre, layout, compartir, creador_id, es_propia, widgets_count)
GET /api/plantillas - Requires authentication
PUT /api/plantillas/{id} - Update sharing settings (only creator can edit)
PUT /api/plantillas/{id} - Returns 403 for non-creator
DELETE /api/plantillas/{id} - Delete own template
DELETE /api/plantillas/{id} - Returns 403 for non-creator
DELETE /api/plantillas/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent template
POST /api/plantillas/{id}/aplicar - Apply template copies layout to user's dashboard config
POST /api/plantillas/{id}/aplicar - Works for shared templates (compartir=todos)
POST /api/plantillas/{id}/aplicar - Returns 404 for non-existent template
GET /api/usuarios/lista - Returns list of other users for sharing selection
GET /api/usuarios/lista - Requires authentication
GET /api/dashboard/templates - All 4 predefined templates exist (Ejecutivo, Ventas, Inventario, Analítico)
Predefined templates can be applied via POST /api/dashboard/config
Frontend: Personalizar mode shows 'Guardar como Plantilla' button
Frontend: Save as Template modal has name input, description input, and 3 visibility options
Frontend: Templates modal has 2 sections: 'Plantillas del Sistema' and 'Plantillas Personalizadas'
Frontend: Custom template row shows name, share status badge, Apply/Share/Delete buttons
Frontend: Share modal allows changing visibility and selecting specific users
Frontend: Applying a predefined template (Inventario) works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed templates during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared Dashboard Templates feature fully tested. Users can create templates with 3 sharing options (privada, usuarios, todos). Templates modal shows both predefined (4 system templates) and custom templates. Share modal allows changing visibility and selecting specific users. Applying a shared template copies the layout to user's dashboard config. Access control working - only creator can edit/delete their templates. Previous iterations tested auth, products, statistics, dashboard widgets, metas - those remain stable.
